module.name: no-destructured-parameter-type-literal
module.description: Disallow inline object type literals on destructured parameters; require a named type instead.

scenarios.name: should allow an object-destructured parameter typed with a named interface
scenarios.given: a function parameter written as { set }: IUiActions
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the parameter type annotation

scenarios.name: should allow a non-destructured parameter with an inline object type literal
scenarios.given: a function parameter written as actions: Readonly<{ readonly set: UiStateSetter }>
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the parameter type annotation

specifications.feature: Inline object type literals on destructured parameters

scenarios.name: should report a destructured parameter with a direct inline object type literal
scenarios.given: a function parameter written as { set }: { readonly set: UiStateSetter }
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the parameter type annotation

scenarios.name: should report a destructured parameter with a Readonly-wrapped inline object type literal
scenarios.given: a function parameter written as { set }: Readonly<{ set: UiStateSetter }>
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the parameter type annotation

scenarios.name: should report a destructured assignment parameter with an inline object type literal
scenarios.given: a function parameter written as { set }: Readonly<{ set: UiStateSetter }> = defaults
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the parameter type annotation
